title: SchemaVersion
description: A specific Version of a Schema. Self-contained: combines the generic Version fields and the schema-specific extension fields into one schema, with integer-typed versionId and ancestor.

ancestor.description: The versionId of this Version's ancestor, or this Version's versionId if it has no ancestor.

createdAt.description: The date/time of when the entity was created.

description.description: A human-readable summary of the purpose of the entity.

documentation.description: A URL to additional information about this entity.

epoch.description: A numeric value used to determine whether an entity has been modified.

labels.description: A mechanism in which additional metadata about the entity can be stored without changing the model definition of the entity. Labels can be used for querying.

modifiedAt.description: The date/time of when the entity was last updated.

contentType.description: Content type of the schema Version.

schemaDocument.description: The raw schema document for this Version as base64-encoded bytes.

schemaDocumentHash.description: The hash of the schema document for this Version.
